title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICICI Prudential Life in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!
